finding_results.notes: Replaced Sylvia's remembered death notification from verbatim calibration text ('Agent Crane is dead') to institutional WISE shorthand ('We lost Crane at the checkpoint'), preserving her flat professional register without copying the example line. Replaced Anya's spoken disclosure from the echoing 'Crane is dead' to 'They killed Crane', shifting to active voice with angrier pressure-true bluntness appropriate to Anya's family register under duress. A third instance of 'Crane is dead' at line 515 (Damian's interior thought) was left untouched because it is Damian's own internal cataloging voice, not a reproduction of Sylvia's institutional register or the calibration pattern.

summary: Single finding addressed: style-bible calibration language ('Agent Crane is dead') removed from both the remembered Sylvia notification (line 3) and Anya's spoken disclosure (line 33). Sylvia's beat now uses 'We lost Crane at the checkpoint' (institutional collective-loss framing). Anya's beat now uses 'They killed Crane' (active, angrier, character-true under pressure). No structural, continuity, or voice-signature collateral changes. Heading contract preserved.
